'''Ka'Dedus''' was an ultraviolet supergiant [[Star/Legends|star]] that was the primary of the [[Ka'Dedus system/Legends|Ka'Dedus system]] in which [[Af'El/Legends|Af'El]] was located.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Right Place ...|book=The Politics of Contraband|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
